title: coaching knowledge phase 2 — publish-cascade implementation plan
description:
## Summary

Phase 2 plan for the coaching knowledge pipeline (spec PR #633, phase 1 PR #635).

**12 TDD tasks** taking a Phase-1 snippet → versioned Template → publish into one of four surfaces:
- **Questionnaire-Item** — full cascade into existing `questionnaire_templates`
- **Assistant-Knowledge** — full cascade into a `coaching-assistant` knowledge collection (Voyage embeddings)
- **Brett-Preset, Chatroom-Übung** — store-only stubs in `coaching.templates`; live surfacing is a separate Phase 2b plan (Brett + Chat both need new schema/UI work that's bigger than a typical 'publish' step)

Key technical pieces:
- New `coaching.templates` (versioned) + `coaching.template_assignments` tables
- Pure-function §51 UrhG quote-length validator (max 280 verbatim chars); enforced server-side at publish + client-side live in editor
- `coaching-publish.ts` cascade module — single dispatcher per `target_surface`
- `PublishEditor.svelte` with surface selector, per-surface form fields, live preview, quote warning
- Templates list page at `/admin/knowledge/templates` with surface filter
- Playwright unauth-path checks

## Test plan

- [ ] Plan reviewed for placeholder-free TDD tasks (done in self-review)
- [ ] Execution via `superpowers:subagent-driven-development` after merge
- [ ] Each task ends with a working commit

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
